title: bromus divaricatus var. lanuginosus
intro: Bromus divaricatus var. lanuginosus, also known as hairy panic grass, is a variety of the woodland brome plant that is characterized by its soft, hairy leaves and stems. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues and as a natural diuretic. The health benefits of Bromus divaricatus var. lanuginosus include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and supporting urinary tract health. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
